snippets.comment: Very clear organized course style. Homework is designed to help with the tests. Tests are no challenge and go off of the textbook.  Many extra credit assignments. Of the 2 classes I took from her, I got above 100% both times. Only thing is the assignments were graded last minute. The grading was ver

She had optional zoom meetings which helped me with actually looking through the bookwork, however,  you don't need to attend if you are busy. She had many extra credit opportunities and was understanding if you missed a couple of assignments, just communicate with her through email. Would take agai
The best out there i aint gonna lie to yall,Best teacher out their hands down when it comes to Chinese, I'm going to tell you right now, Chinese is easier than Spanish.
